Public Notice: Water Supply Maintenance Schedule

Published: 12-06-2026

Residents of Wards 4, 7, and 11 are hereby informed that water supply will be temporarily suspended for scheduled pipeline maintenance work between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM on the dates listed below.

WardDateAffected Areas
418-06-2026Sector 4A, 4B
719-06-2026Sector 7A, 7C, 7D
1120-06-2026Sector 11B

Residents are advised to store sufficient water in advance for daily requirements during the maintenance window. Tanker supply will be made available at designated points in each affected ward upon request.

For queries, contact the Public Works helpline at the number listed on the official portal, or visit the nearest ward office during business hours.
